commit_date.text: วันที่ประชุม

root.sql:
SELECT count( 1 ) as member_01
,( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE mem_type <> '01' AND member_status_code = '0') as member_02
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!') AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'SHR' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) ) as buy_share
,( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_application_form WHERE ( sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type = '01' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_application_form.cancel_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_status = '2' ) ) as new_mem_01
,( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_application_form WHERE ( sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type <> '01' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_application_form.cancel_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_status = '2' ) ) as new_mem_02
,( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code <> '01' ) ) as resign_mem_01
,( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = '01' ) ) as resign_mem_01_dead
,( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type <> '01' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code <> '01' ) ) as resign_mem_02
,( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type <> '01' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = '01' ) ) as resign_mem_02_dead
, ( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_chang_request, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det WHERE ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new >= sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old ) ) as share_incre
, ( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_chang_request, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det WHERE ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new < sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old ) ) as share_decre
, ( SELECT count( 1 ) FROM sc_mem_m_chang_request, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det WHERE ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between '!op_date_1!' and '!op_date_2!' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status = '2' ) AND ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status = '1' ) ) as share_drop
, '!op_date_1!' as bdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate ( '!op_date_2!' , 'MONTH YYYY' ) as edate , ('!commit_chood_1!')::text as commit_chood , ('!commit_count_1!')::text as commit_count , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!commit_date_1!', 'SD MONTH YYYY') as commit_date FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE mem_type = '01' AND member_status_code = '0' GROUP BY mem_type
